targets.query:
from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "traffic_flow" and r._field == "bytes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.src_ip == "${device_ip}" or r.dst_ip == "${device_ip}")
  |> group(columns: ["src_ip", "dst_ip", "protocol"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)

from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "traffic_flow" and r._field == "bytes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.src_ip == "${device_ip}" or r.dst_ip == "${device_ip}")
  |> group(columns: ["src_ip", "dst_ip", "protocol"])
  |> sum()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 30)

from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "adguard_query" and r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.client_ip == "${device_ip}")
  |> group(columns: ["domain", "query_type", "blocked", "reason"])
  |> sum()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)

deviceSeen = from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_seen" and r._field == "seen")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.ip == "${device_ip}")
  |> group(columns: ["collector", "ip", "mac", "name", "hostname", "kind", "source"])
  |> last()

adguardSeen = from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "adguard_query" and r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.client_ip == "${device_ip}")
  |> group(columns: ["client_ip", "client_name"])
  |> last()

union(tables: [deviceSeen, adguardSeen])

list.definition:
from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_seen" and r._field == "seen")
  |> keep(columns: ["ip"])
  |> distinct(column: "ip")
list.label: Device IP
list.name: device_ip
list.query:
from(bucket: "network")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_seen" and r._field == "seen")
  |> keep(columns: ["ip"])
  |> distinct(column: "ip")
